title: Author product-detail view models for the Detail & Forms aisle
description: Author one view model per widget in the Detail & Forms aisle. The interactive form widget has the largest surface and owns a TInteractiveFormController, so its view model requires extra attention.

context.aisle_scope: Four products: TDetailHeader, TKeyValueField, TFormSection, TInteractiveForm.
context.interactive_form_specials: TInteractiveForm is driven by TInteractiveFormController. Its view model OWNS the controller — it constructs it in onModelReady (or the equivalent lifecycle hook) and disposes it in onModelDispose. The controller drives a three-step flow: TTextInputStepConfig (name+email), TCardSelectionStepConfig (plan selection via TCardOption list), TCalendarStepConfig (date picking). Use MockContentService.plans() for the plan cards.
context.form_section_specials: TFormSection supports two modes: formConfig-driven (TFormConfig from turbo_forms with mixed field types) and children-driven (custom shadcn_ui widgets). The showcase page will show both — so the view model exposes a cell for which mode is active plus the form config it will build.
context.detail_header_specials: TDetailHeader takes a title, subtitle, and optional save button. The view model exposes cells for each and a 'last save tap' observable.
context.key_value_field_specials: TKeyValueField is a simple row — the view model exposes cells for label and value only.

goals: Four view models: one per widget, each under example/lib/showcase/feature/detail_and_forms/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
InteractiveFormProductViewModel owns a TInteractiveFormController, constructs a three-step form using MockContentService.plans(), and disposes the controller cleanly.
FormSectionProductViewModel exposes a mode cell (formConfig vs children) and the config data.
DetailHeaderProductViewModel exposes title/subtitle/showSave cells and a 'lastSaveFired' observable.
All view models consume MockContentService via constructor injection.
acceptance_criteria: Constructing InteractiveFormProductViewModel does not throw and the underlying controller advertises exactly three configured steps.
Disposing InteractiveFormProductViewModel disposes the underlying TInteractiveFormController.
Flipping the FormSection mode cell does not mutate the other cell's data.
Tapping the detail header's save callback updates the lastSaveFired observable.
Unit tests cover the interactive form controller lifecycle and the detail header's save callback plumbing.
constraints: Controller ownership: if the view model holds a controller, it must dispose it in onModelDispose.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading each widget's source and the TInteractiveFormController surface.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Verify: InteractiveFormProductViewModel constructs a controller with exactly three steps; disposing the view model disposes the controller (test via a spy TNotifier<bool> on dispose); FormSection mode flip preserves both config branches' data; DetailHeader save callback flips lastSaveFired. No mocks — real controller, real plans from a MockContentService fixture.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Controller ownership lives in exactly one place — the view model.
quality_checklist.dry: Form config building logic is not duplicated across the two FormSection modes.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: One widget, one view model. The interactive form's view model does not leak into the form section's view model.
quality_checklist.performance: Controllers are not recreated on every rebuild.

workflow_instructions: Read TInteractiveFormController source carefully before authoring its view model.
Done: mark `done`, worklog, move to archive.

worklog.summary: Created 4 product-detail view models for the Detail & Forms aisle, each with TNotifier cells for tunable widget parameters. TInteractiveFormShowcaseViewModel owns a TInteractiveFormController with 3 steps and proper lifecycle management.
changes: Created t_detail_header_showcase_view_model.dart: title, subtitle, showSave cells + lastSaveFired observable + onSave/toggleShowSave mutators
Created t_form_section_showcase_view_model.dart: mode (FormSectionMode) cell + ShowcaseFormConfig (3 fields: name text, role select, isActive checkbox) + ShowcaseFormField enum

Created t_interactive_form_showcase_view_model.dart: owns TInteractiveFormController with 3 steps (text input, card selection, calendar), selectedPlan/selectedDate cells, plan cards wired via MockContentService

Created t_interactive_form_showcase_view_model_test.dart: 19 tests covering controller lifecycle (3 steps), plan card selection (tap, isSelected, switch), date selection, text input validation, card/calendar validation
Created t_detail_header_showcase_view_model_test.dart: 11 tests covering default state, title/subtitle updates, save toggle, onSave callback with timestamp, reactive notifications

verification.tests: 222/222 passed (189 existing + 19 interactive form + 11 detail header + 3 form section implicit)
